question_fa: کدام برج‌ها در ایران هم برج دیدبانی و هم برج مخابراتی هستند؟
question_en: Which towers in Iran are both observation and communication towers?
template_fa: کدام [نوع_مورد] هم [شرط A] و هم [شرط B] هستند؟
template_en: Which [item type] are both [Condition A] and [Condition B]?
sparql_query:
SELECT DISTINCT ?item ?itemLabel ?locationLabel ?architectLabel ?inceptionLabel ?heightLabel WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q1440300.       # Observation tower
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q1798641.       # Communication tower
  ?item wdt:P17 wd:Q794.           # Iran

  SERVICE wikibase:label { 
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "[AUTO_LANGUAGE],fa,en". 
    ?item rdfs:label ?itemLabel.
    ?location rdfs:label ?locationLabel.
    ?architect rdfs:label ?architectLabel.
    ?inception rdfs:label ?inceptionLabel.
    ?height rdfs:label ?heightLabel.
  }
}
ORDER BY ?itemLabel
LIMIT 100
gold_labels_en: Milad Tower;Gorgan Tower
gold_labels_fa: برج میلاد;برج گرگان
gold_display_label: Milad Tower;Gorgan Tower

question_fa: کدام مکان‌ها در ایران هم شهر باستانی هستند و هم در فهرست میراث جهانی یونسکو ثبت شده‌اند؟
question_en: Which places in Iran are both ancient cities and listed as UNESCO World Heritage sites?
template_fa: کدام [نوع_مورد] هم [شرط A] و هم [شرط B] هستند؟
template_en: Which [item type] are both [Condition A] and [Condition B]?
sparql_query:
SELECT DISTINCT ?item ?itemLabel ?locationLabel ?inceptionLabel ?criteriaLabel WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P17 wd:Q794.

  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q15661340.  # A: Ancient city
  ?item wdt:P1435 wd:Q9259.    # C: UNESCO World Heritage Site

  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "[AUTO_LANGUAGE],fa,en".
    ?item rdfs:label ?itemLabel.
    ?location rdfs:label ?locationLabel.
    ?inception rdfs:label ?inceptionLabel.
    ?criteria rdfs:label ?criteriaLabel.
  }
}
ORDER BY ?itemLabel
LIMIT 100

sparql_query:
SELECT DISTINCT ?item ?itemLabel ?locationLabel ?architectLabel ?inceptionLabel WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q17431399.   # A
  ?item wdt:P17 wd:Q794.
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q207694. }  # NOT B

  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "[AUTO_LANGUAGE],fa,en".
    ?item rdfs:label ?itemLabel.
    ?location rdfs:label ?locationLabel.
    ?architect rdfs:label ?architectLabel.
    ?inception rdfs:label ?inceptionLabel.
  }
}
ORDER BY ?itemLabel
LIMIT 100
